'''Kraeth squad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] unit consisting of seven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. They were part of a clean-up crew left behind on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] after the [[Battle of Taul|assault]] on the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] located on the planet. They participated in the subsequent [[skirmish on Taul]]. The squad was armed with [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blasters]] and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Return to Taul}}
